list_info.科目英文名: Selected American Short Stories and Articles

detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 美國短篇文選 (Selected American Short Stories and Articles)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 陳宛利	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
-To enhance students' ability to critically analyze and interpret a wide range of readings on complex themes -To facilitate discussions on contemporary issues related to border-crossing, sustainability and cultural heritage -To develop students' abilities to articulate their ideas and findings effectively in both written and verbal forms -To inspire interest in learning about and addressing the critical challenges facing our world today 


2.教學綱要
This course guides students through the autobiographical writing of the renowned Mexican-American author Francisco Jiménez, engaging them with contemporary critical issues surrounding border-crossing. The class focuses on U.S.-Mexico borderland issues, self-alienation under capitalism, labor exploitation, social mobility, and postmemory. It encourages students to explore diverse voices from the margins and deepen their understanding of these critical issues.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Assessment: Punctuality and attendance, in-class group discussion and presentation, Quiz (40%); Midterm Exam (30%); Final Exam (30%)  
Course Requirements: Students are expected to attend all class sessions and come prepared with the required course materials. Late arrival, failure to bring course materials, or engaging in distractions such as phone use (“phubbing”) will result in deductions from the final grade. Each group discussion counts toward your participation grade; active engagement is essential. Punctuality is mandatory. Students may be called on at random to answer questions and will be graded based on how well they demonstrate understanding of the assigned readings. There are no make-up quizzes for absences. It is your responsibility to understand the course requirements and manage your performance accordingly. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG1 終結貧窮、SDG10 減少不平等
